title: IIAP Recruitment 2026 - Walk-In-Interview for Senior Project Associate Posts
description: Indian Institute of Astrophysics (IIAP) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of various Senior Project Associate Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc, Ph.D can grab this chance and apply for the IIAP Recruitment 2026 . Here we include the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can attend the walk-in at the address below. If you are looking for more, here ...
